title: paspalum rufum
intro: Paspalum rufum, also known as the red grass or buffalo grass, is a type of grass belonging to the genus Paspalum, a group of grasses native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Paspalum rufum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Paspalum rufum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
